      • Powered By

        • ...a Path, not a program

           

          Gear-up to co-create 

          next culture... one gameworld at a time.

        • WELCOME!

          We are a global Team of Edgeworking genius-types on the Path of becoming fully effective Possibilitators.

          Together we are healing and transforming our inner structures to consciously collaborate with Gaia AND learn the skills of delivering what we came here to create.

          Possibilitator Training is a Gaian Gameworld.

          And... we welcome you here!

          The purpose of Possibilitator Training is to heal and empower each other enough to build out and occupy the infrastructure of next culture - archearchy - the regenerative cultures that are emerging now that matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course.

          This Path is rich with challenges, deep dives into yourself, authentic connections with highly motivated Team players, learning so many things you never knew you did not know about.

          You will be Upgrading Human Thoughtware starting with your own, delivering Processes for others both on this Path and in life, and building bridges to archearchy - 'next culture' - by bringing to life your own Gaian Gameworlds.

          What does it cost? 

          Nothing. 

          And... it costs everything.

          Joining the global community of Possibilitators-in-Training does not cost any money.

           

          There are no monthly dues or membership fees. This is not a pyramid scheme. This is not a sect. It isn't even a hierarchy.

           

          There are, however, respected requirements and a clear context. And, it is a Path. Paths work according to their own protocol and the laws of Transformation.

           

          It only makes sense to apply to the Possibilitator Training tribe if you have already participated at least one official Expand The Box training (not a Practice Expand The Box) and in addition, are so inspired that you commit to yourself at the level of participating enthusiastically in a multi-year evolutionary Path that includes at least 10 Possibility Labs.

           

          An authentic transformational Path is different for each person - meaning Possibilitator Training is NOT a program with a curriculum. This Path adapts to you because you are unique.

           

          Typically, in the time you are doing your 10 Possibility Labs with various Lab Trainers of your choice, you will also do your 3-3-3 Practice, join or create a weekly online-or-offline Possibility Team, participate and then possibly deliver Rage Club, or Fear Club, watch the 100 recommended films often with others in your 3Cell, read the 50 recommended books perhaps in your Study Group, and earn thousands of Matrix Points in the StartOver.xyz matrix-building free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade personal-transformation true-life adventure-game, contexted in Radical Responsibility. You will become an Experimenter.

           

          Most of these activities are done collaboratively in Teams with other Possibilitators from around the world. Some of these activities require monetary exchange. We are noticing that the biggest challenge during Possibilitator Training can be the next culture financial commitment - which involves a radical shift in your financial world. The shift is that you stop being an 'employee' and instead you become someone who can receive money in exchange for your Archetypal Lineage services. How is it allowed that you receive money for something so rewarding?

           

          Making this shift will be how you come into enough money to fund your healing and evolutionary Path, and the rest of your life coming together around that. We ask you to go through whatever Emotional Healing Processes are necessary for you to becoming willing to receive money in exchange for contributing your Value.

           

          The Universe wants you to evolve. Will you let E.C.C.O. help you?

           

          NOTE: Everything in Possibilitator Training (and in Possibility Management, and StartOver.xyz) is copyleft, open code thoughtware, created and shared so as to feed the Creative Commons, protected by a legal license so that it can NEVER be copyrighted (CC SA BY International 4.0 License). Everything shared in Possibilitator Training yours to use, to share, to sell, to modify, to deliver to your clients so that you can quit your modern-culture corporate job and make 'Possibilitator' your next-culture profession... and you CANNOT copyright it. Please attribute what you use to http://possibilitymanagement.org so that others can also find this Path. Thank you. There is a LOT MORE where all this came from. Please help us download and share more of Possibility Management with many others. The human race needs all the thoughtware-upgrade help it can get right now. Humans are using VERY old thoughtware, and the consequences are ecocidal.

           

          WARNING: Why do we say it will cost you everything? Because we have seen Possibilitator Training in action, in one form or another, since 1975. From this direct experience we can tell you this: it works.

           

          What does that mean 'it works' ?

           

          It means that it changes you.

           

          What does 'it changes you' mean?

           

          It means that who you were before (any amount of uninitiated, wounded, victimy, adolescent, adaptive, powerless, reactive, voiceless, numb, isolated, arrogant, terrified, revengeful, manipulative, sneaking, despairing, resentful, cramped up, shut-down, hopeless, contaminated, etc...) gradually ends, and gets replaced by something far less civilized and far more skillfully human. Whatever parts of this de-civilization process occur in you are known to be irreversible. Expanding consciousness is a one-way road.

           

          In Possibilitator Training you sacrifice 'the old way' that you have been living. You consume it as transformational fuel. You Compost Yourself.

           

          In other words, what we mean when we say 'it costs you everything' is that the world will work different for you after those 10 Possibility Labs. Your old Survival Strategy will lose its grip on you in the same way that an empty chrysalis holds no more power over a Cicada after the Cicada climbs out of the shell and takes off flying.

        • photo by Possibilitator Katrin Düser

          BEWARE: If you do NOT want your current life to vanish through your fingers like dry sand, then please exit this web page now and go enjoy yourself somewhere else.

           

          Yes. These are CAUTIONARY NOTES. Psycho-Emotional Initiatory Transformation is a hobby that does not suit everyone's tastes, and this is precisely what we do here at Possibilitator Training.

        • What Possibilitator Training Is

          'POSSIBILITATOR'?

          To be clear, the verb 'to possibilitate' means 'to render possible'.

           

          This term was first recorded in writing in the The Quarterly Review: Principles of Elementary Teaching, January/April 1829, page 134 edited by Sir John Taylor Coleridge et. al.

           

          A 'possibilitator' is, therefore, 'one who possibilitates'.

           

          The term 'Possibilitator', spelled with a capital 'P', signifies 'a possibilitator who consciously Possibilitates in the service of Bright Principles, and in the Possibility Management Context of Radical Responsibility'.

           

          As a Possibilitator you prepare yourself to become a triple-intersection, that is, the space through which three archetypal forces collaboratively coincide:

          1. Your Archetypal Lineage
          2. Earth Coincidence Control Office (E.C.C.O.), and
          3.  Archetypal Love.

          If you want to head for something like that, then you are in the right place.

          A PATH, NOT A PROGRAM

          Each person's pathway through Possibilitator Training is unique.

           

          Your Path has a beginning: your first Expand The Box training. But it has no end. As it is written, "There are many paths up the Mountain, but there is no Mountain."

           

          Therefore, the top of the Mountain can never be reached.

           

          This is good news. It means there will always be something interesting to do next!

           

          And from the first moment on, there are only Possibilities.

          A RESEARCH AND EMPOWERMENT PATH

          Possibilitator Training is not looking to be empowered by what you already know or have learned elsewhere. Rather Possibility Training is a research and empowerment space that supports YOU to bring your skills, knowledge and gifts to others in the world through building out your own Gaian Gameworld.

           

          We do the research through making Discovery Journeys together into entirely new territory. This research is not about relying on anyone's previously learned knowledge or expertise. Together we Navigate Space to the actual cutting edge of the evolution of human consciousness on Earth, and then we stay there at that edge and document whatever we can.

           

          Discovery Journeys are 'swasheen' (meaning: 'the ecstasy of nonlinear creative collaboration'. It is an archearchal word...). Discovery Journeys are swasheen because Possibility Training is Teamwork. We are all in it together.

           

          There are no 'teachers', 'gurus', or 'guides' who have already been there and 'educate' you about their previous experiences.

           

          This is new territory. NOBODY has already been there.

           

          The Circle of Possibilitators in Training is a Coalition Of Mutual Endeavor. We empower each other to deepen and refine our skills by jacking-in to extraordinary Clarity and Resources. As a result of your new inner and outer resources, you build your Circle, navigate your Team, Make Legendary Doorways so others can find you, and then deliver what you came here to deliver.

          CONNECT WITH A GLOBAL TEAM OF POSSIBILITATORS ON THE PATH

          Possibilitator Training is for those interested in learning to apply the tools, thoughtmaps, distinctions and processes of Possibility Management in any specialty you wish, yet we go on this expansive journey together. The Team is made up of others around the world who have also committing to the 10 Possibility Labs, so you can count on their commitment to this part of their Transformational path just as they can count on you.

           

          You will be in projects and 3Cells, which are Teams of 3 people from around the world checking in with each other, caring about how it is going, sharing discoveries, celebrating both victories and frustrations exchanging caring Feedback and Coaching with peers.

           

          You will discover how to Hold and Navigate a safe place for someone else to step forward and take the risk of making even a safer place for you to unfold into. The potentials and discoveries that emerge are completely available for everyone to use for the rest of our lives.

          AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD INITIATORY PROCESS

          Modern culture banished Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes some 6000 years ago. We long ago forgot how deeply handicapped we are, yet something deep in us still yearns to live into something more real than what western culture calls 'success'.

           

          Since 1975, small private Teams of edgeworkers turned themselves into Experimenters and have been researching together, documenting what works and does not work. Out of this has slowly emerged a solid collection of Tools, Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, and Processes for everyone to use. This is Possibility management, thoughtware for next culture.

           

          These are not some philosophical set of concepts to think about. These are actual bridges from the edges of modern culture to regenerative next culture - archearchy - thriving in a context of Radical Responsibility.

           

          In next culture, authentic adulthood initiatory processes are at the center. Growing up and beginning adulthood is the currency that has value. Each one is called to unleash and ignite their Archetypal Lineage and serve the village with the Service they came here to provide.

          3 PHASE TRANSFORMATIONAL EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESSES

          Are there blocks and internal barriers to deal with? Yes. Many. There are layer after layer of blocks and barriers. But not too many.

           

          And digging through your Underworld is not the Purpose. The Purpose is to help each other escape from the 8 Prisons, relocate your Point Of Origin into the Present, in a small NOW, Centered, Grounded, Bubbled, and Connected.

           

          The wounds we carry or try to hide from childhood, from being born into a capitalist patriarchal empire, from not being seen, from our deeper needs not being acknowledged, these we have found ways to use as Doorways for Emotional Healing Processes.

           

          We call this 'Transformational' Healing because instead of trying to take the disease out of you, we take you out of the disease. When you are 'Transformed', the disease won't fit you anymore. This is 3 Phase Healing which works hand-in-hand with Thoughtware Upgrades and Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes.

           

          Once you have been through a Process yourself, you have the internal references to navigate this Process for others.

           

          You keep what you learn. Then you carry the Seeds of next culture... archearchy.

          DISTILL AND ACTIVATE YOUR BRIGHT PRINCIPLES

          Human beings are designed to directly interact with the archetypal energies of the Universe without intermediaries. One of these energies is Bright Principles, the splinters of Archetypal Love and raw consciousness at large.

           

          You have pre-selected a set of 3 to 6 Bright Principles to serve in this life. If you do not know what they are, your actions are fuzzy and your aim is inaccurate. As we work to distill your Bright Principles from your life so far, you gain a rare opportunity. You gain the opportunity to be your Destiny in action now.

           

          These forces of nature become allies of intelligence and energy you can call into your work spaces to facilitate what you need to create there.

           

          Being aligned with archetypal forces of nature turns out to be not so bad a way to live.

          DECONTAMINATE YOUR ADULT EGO STATE FROM GREMLIN, CHILD, AND PARENT

          Many of the distinctions and procedures we use from Possibility Management are still unseen by the captains of industry, politics, finance, education, medicine, psychology, and religion. Yet they have already been discovered, refined to an incredible degree of precision, and are available for you to use.

           

          The idea that each person lives inside of a self-made Survival Strategy guarded by their Gremlin yet waiting for something transformational and real-beyond-measure to occur around their 18th year but it never comes... is completely foreign to modern cultures. But it is not foreign to you.

           

          Yet without the clarity of fiercely navigated Processes that put you face-to-face with your Shadow World and your Unconscious Purposes, Adulthood will continue to evade you for your whole life. Why? Because as a child you figured out a sure way to protect yourself. If you mix your Gremlin Ego State into your Adult Ego State, then no one can touch you. Or if you banish your Gremlin so thoroughly then you can be a 'nice boy' or a 'good girl' forever, even still to day.

           

          Yes, these tricks work. You did survive. But your Gremlin Ego State (or Child Ego State, or Parent Ego State, or all three...) are still mixed in with your Adult Ego State, and you are blocked from being simply present. You cannot enter relationship, because the space you are supposed to occupy is already filled with something else. You aren't there. A part of you knows that you are only putting on a show. Nobody talks about this, and nobody can do anything about it. Until now.

           

          If you do not Decontaminate your Adult Ego State, you are also blocked from entering the Archetypal Domains. You won't even have a taste of 5 Body Intimacy Journeys. Possibilitator Training heads straight there, and step after step the changes happen.

          ESCAPE FROM THE 8 PRISONS - EXIT THE PATRIARCHY

          Without realizing that you are in a prison, you will have no impulse to try to escape it.

           

          If no one succeeds in escaping a prison you will never consider that escape might be possible.

           

          You are born into 8 Prisons, nested one inside the other, and will remain there until you escape from them, thoroughly, one at a time. Look around. Once you know that the Prisons exist and how they work, you can see how everyone you know is locked down under these same restrictions.

           

          Eight layers down in there is where you are, tiny, terrified, invisible, crushed, suffocating, indifferent or hopeless. It has gone on like this for decades. Since everyone else has the same afflictions you cannot know how handicapped you are. Where do you even start?

           

          It is possible to escape the 8 Prisons, to escape the patriarchy, but not alone. Escaping the 8 Prisons is Teamwork.

          PREPARE TO JACK-IN TO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

          One of the most fantastic notions about being a human being is the chance to become a tripe intersection between Earth Coincidence Control Office (E.C.C.O.), Archetypal Love, and your Archetypal Lineage.

           

          Modern culture teaches us nothing about these things. That does not mean are not relevant, important, and utterly cool. It means modern culture is running on very outdated Thoughtware.

           

          You can take Radical Responsibility for updating your thoughtware.

           

          This was the original impulse for Possibility Management to come into existence: to discover how to become something that has access to more than ordinary Possibility as a service to your Village.

           

          In next culture - archearchy - preparing to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage is the central Value, the main currency, and the primary occupation of your first 18 years of life.

           

          The awarenesses, experiences, and skills needed to prepare yourself to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage reach from head to toe and cannot be successfully checked off like a 'To Do' list or the classes to fulfill requirements for receiving a university degree. No. Each one of the preparations re-organizes your shape to the degree that it keeps feeling like you never knew anything at all and must continuously StartOver.xyz again at the beginning.

           

          Understanding the Learning Spiral gives you a Thoughtmap that fundamentally changes your strategy. You can forget about 'accomplishing something' or 'achieving something' and shift into Noticing in Experiential Reality what is actually Possible in the Space your are Navigating right NOW.

           

          By the time your Archetypal Lineage feels confident that you are not only able to get the job, but are also able to do the job, then the jacking-in will occur suddenly almost by reflex. However, by the time you hear THIS message, you have barely enough time to do the preparatory work. After all, your 4 Enemies do not rest...

          TAKE RADICAL RESPONSIBILITY FOR YOUR OWN VALUE AND YOUR OWN CULTURE

          Each Gameworld you participate in - and you participate in many Gameworlds in your daily life, either consciously or unconsciously (and it pays to make your participation conscious...) has a Context serving certain Values at one of the 5 levels of Responsibility: none, child, adult, high, radical.

           

          A Zombie is someone who is unaware of the Values of the Gameworlds they play in...

           

          What happens in Possibilitator Training is you get Centered, Grounded, Bubbles, Present, and Clear enough to respectfully Hold Space for your own Culture even while interacting with people from other Contexts and other levels of Responsibility, and other Cultures.

           

          This is extremely High Level Fun! ...ecstatic in ways that modern culture does not even have words to describe. But you are designed to experience these kinds of ecstasies on a daily basis.

           

          By taking Radical Responsibility for what you are designed for, you suddenly come into Resonance with the Universe in a way that brings the world to life. This is how Possibilitator Training - and next culture - thrives: creative collaboration making critical connections between communities of practice to generate a field of influence for the emergence of next culture.

          LEARN TO BUILD GAIAN GAMEWORLDS

          The Gameworlds of modern culture have taken the future away from so many hundreds of species, culture, and ecosystems around the world. We are headed for ecocide... not a pretty sight, indeed.

           

          Something completely different from this is possible, and you are part of bringing it into existence. We suggest you study the Gaian Gameworlds website and start wrapping your head around the new distinctions presented there.

           

          We are on this planet together, and it is not our planet. We destroy this planet's organic stability at our own peril.

           

          The good news is that every single one of the ways human beings interact with each other and with the world (laws, infrastructure, transportation, education, governance, religion, ownership, finances, business, medicine, healing, birth, death...) needs to be brought to an end and relocated to an archearchal point of origin.

           

          Why is this good news? Because it is your job. You have incredibly legendary work to do.

           

          If you do not do it, who will? Who else but you has the insight and the motivation? Who else can? No one. It is your turn to do your best. The 'old rabbits' are dying off.

           

          These jobs are on your bench are precise: StartOver.xyz and build from scratch entirely new Radically Responsible human cultures using Gaian Gameworlds.

           

          Do you already know how to do this? No. You do not.

           

          Must you do this? Yes.

           

          Any questions? Give us a call. We are glad you exist. We want you to succeed. Harbigarrr! Let's get to it!

          IS POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT CLARITY OR RIGIDITY?

          With so many Distinctions, so many names for things, so many precisions and procedures... Possibility Management seems so rigid! Where is the organic freedom of expression? How can you be relaxed? A human being?

           

          Good questions. There as many ways to think about this as you have Parts, and if you care to Self Observe about it, you have an entire Zoo of Parts! An complex Underworld Ecology seethes just beneath the surface of your awareness, doing what it wants whenever it wants to. In a single comment that you make, three or four of your various Parts can easily seize control and operate what you think, what you feel, and what you say. To this unruly mob of Inner Permaculture characters, you learning to Inner Navigate, using your Conscious Will and Intention to make conscious Decisions, this can seem threatening, the 'end of your fun times'.

           

          For us, the Distinctions, Tools, Thoughtmaps, and Processes of Possibility Management seem like the rungs of a ladder to climb to enter a new world. The ladder could not function if the rungs were not rigid. This ladder goes somewhere extraordinary. The choice is up to you. If you want to go from where you are to somewhere else, Possibilitator Training is one Path to do that. If you decide to use Possibilitator Training, you will be on a Team with others of equal commitment.

           

          You may wish to use Possibility Management to create or enhance a mixed-context gameworld. Possibility Management excels at supporting many other gameworlds to thrive in unprecedented ways. However, Possibility Management itself is not a mixed-context gameworld. Possibility Management is a pure context gameworld, and that context is clear.

          BELOW ARE 5 SECTIONS OF RESOURCES AVAILABLE FOR YOU DURING POSSIBILITATOR TRAINING: 

          1. EXTRAORDINARY HEALING RESOURCES

          2. EXTRAORDINARY SKILL-BUILDING RESOURCES

          3. EXTRAORDINARY IDENTITY-SHIFT RESOURCES

          4. EXTRAORDINARY SOURCES OF FURTHER EXTRAORDINARY RESOURCES!

        •  

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

           

          Global Team of Possibilitators in Training...

        • Extraordinary Healing Resources

          We forced ourselves to adapt to a particular 'normal' in order to survive.

          You have already survived.

          The changeover from surviving to living was supposed to begin around your 18th birthday.

          It never started.

          Modern culture banished Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes around 6000 years ago.

          You are to a large degree stuck within 8 self-made prisons.

          One of the customs in Possibilitator Training is to help each other escape from these prisons.

          The healing processes themselves are extraordinary...

        • Extraordinary Skill-Building Resources

          No one can learn a new skill for you.

          On the other hand, no one can stop you from doing whatever it takes to learn a new skill yourself.

          There are many skills in Possibilitator Training that you may not know that you did not know about.

          Nonetheless, Possibilitator skills can help you create extraordinary results in your life,

          and in the lives of others.

          One of the customs in Possibilitator Training is to practice Possibilitator skills together.

          Anyone more skilled gives Distinctions and Transformational support to anyone less skilled, if they ask for it.

          Empowering others to create extraordinary results in their lives could quickly become your new profession

        • Extraordinary Identity-Shift Resources

          Somewhere along the Path you will spontaneously relocate your Point Of Origin

          deep into an Identity so connected with reality that no one can take your Authority away.

          Before then, you unconsciously act out the superficial identity handed to you from your local culture and times, for example:

          "I am a programmer, student, woman, nomad, permaculturist, car mechanic, nurse, farmer, production manager, business owner, housewife, surfer, actress, mom..."

          After recognizing that you have natural Resonates with a Service for your Village, your Path branches into learning more specialized skills, and your Authority becomes Archetypal.

          There are many possible self-authorized identities to occupy.

          Here are a few to Scan over and sense if you have any resonance with them...

        • Extraordinary Sources of Resources

          Possibilitator Training empowers you to jack-in to resources both inside and outside of your 5 Bodies... resources that modern culture knows nothing about.

          These are the same resources necessary for:

          - Escaping from the 8 Prisons into Adulthood

          - Transforming your Liquid States into evolutionary jewels 

          - Focusing and stretching to take the next step along your Path 

          - Helping others to do the same.

          Here are Linear and Nonlinear Resources you will gain clearer access to...

        • Possibilitator Training Elements

          The Doorway to enter Possibilitator Training begins with a 3 to 5-day Expand The Box training.

          Your application is formalized by committing to yourself to participate in 10 Possibility Labs over some years.

          Along the way it becomes clear what your Archetypal Lineage is...

          Guardian, Village Weaver, Evolutionary, or Gameworld Builder.

          Possibilitator paths tend to specialize and require developing the particular skills you need,

          reclaiming your Authority, and building out your Gaian Gameworld.

          Here are further resources that may be useful.

          Possibilitators.xyz

          http://possibilitators.xyz

          Possibilitator Skills

          http://possibilitatorskills.mystrikingly.com

          Possibilitator Meetings

          http://possibilitatormeetings.mystrikingly.com

          Possibilitator Resources

          http://possibilitatorresources.mystrikingly.com

          Expand The Box training

          http://possibilitymanagement.org/doingit/etb/

          This is a 3 to 5 day live-in (or recently, online...) Transformational Training.

          IMPORTANT NOTE: Expand The Box is NOT a workshop, NOT a seminar, and NOT a class. It is a Training.

          You will not learn something new.

          Rather it is an evolutionary Space in which you become something new.

          The things you discover at Expand The Box are very difficult to later on become unconscious of.

          We require that be psycho-emotionally fit to participate in Expand The Box training.

          Possibility Labs - the heroine's journey

          (heroes also, if they have the courage...)

          http://possibilitymanagement.org/doingit/plabs/

          Possibility Labs are 4 to 5 day Transformational Healing and Initiatory Spaces (sometimes PLab environments are extended to two weeks or more, for example as has happened in Bali, or Brazil, or Madagascar...). Possibility Labs are navigated by trained Possibility Management Lab Trainers, who are extraordinary human beings with immense Clarity, Possibility, Presence of Being, and life experience.

          We strongly recommend committing to a minimum of 10 Possibility Labs as a reasonable beginning to your shift out of adolescence and stepping into Authentic Adulthood. This includes the magnificent experiences of healing from School, and exiting modern culture and stepping onto (or building...) bridges to next culture: Archearchy.

          PLabs deliver Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, Thoughtware Upgrades, and many unusually swift and effective (although not 'pain free'...) 3 Phase Healing Processes.

          You learn to deliver these Processes to your Clients as you go through the Processes yourself.

          Study Group

          http://studygroup.mystrikingly.com

          Creating or participating in a weekly online-or-offline Study Group, where you read and explore some of the core texts related to Possibility Management and Archearchy, can prove to be not only a steady source of 'transformational food' for your Intellectual and Energetic Bodies, but will also develop your Attentiveness in energetic Spaces. This is the basis of learning to Hold Space.

          Possibility Team

          http://possibilityteam.org

          Creating or participating in a weekly online-or-offline Possibility Team expands your skills from exploration to invention.

          Unfathomable depths of Clarity and Possibility are available to all members of a Possibility Team through the participants themselves. Vast resources of Group Intelligence are liberated through setting a Conscious Context, Holding Space, Navigating Space, calling in Bright Principles, clearly setting Purpose, distinguishing Gremlin and keeping him or her on a short leash, Going Nonlinear, Going Unreasonable, using Expansive Learning, shifting to Experiential Reality, and using Torus Meeting Technologies. All these and more you learn and practice at Possibility Team.

          3Cells

          http://3cells.org

          Fellow journeyers on the Path can become some of the most intimate and reliable of life-long friends, but how do the conversations happen? The answer is in your 3Cells. You create two tiny Circles of 3 people in each Circle. You are the third person in each Circle. Your 3Cell becomes an 'infinity gene' that quickly becomes part of a global network of 3Cells through which you can ask for or deliver anything you need. 3Cells are also perfect for watching and discussing recommended films together, and supporting each other with Emotional Healing Processes and making 'Pirate Agreements' to deal with any challenges to participating in your 10 Plabs.

          3-3-3 Practice

          http://3-3-3.mystrikingly.com

          3-3-3 Practice cleans out your 'energy tubes' and connects you into the source of Archetypal Anger to use for facing things, creating things, and changing thing in your daily life.

          No one can do 3-3-3 for you. On the other hand, no one can stop you from doing 3-3-3.

          This is the beginning of responsibly and respectfully Holding Space for yourself and for your Initiatory Path. If you cannot Hold and Navigate such a Space for yourself, how do you think you can Hold and Navigate this Space and these Processes for others?

          3-3-3 brings you Liquid States three times per week. This is an incredibly useful opportunity for your Healing and Evolution.

          Rage Club

          http://rageclub.org

          After participating in 3 or more Possibility Labs, and once you can Create and Hold Space and Navigate Space for Possibility Team, it becomes time to add in skills for Transforming unconscious anger into Conscious Rage. The intelligence and energy of Stellated Anger become incredibly important and useful resources for taking further steps along your Path. First participating in, and then delivering weekly online-or-offline Rage Club is a perfect jungle-gym to explore the 3 Worlds and how human beings interact with them.

          Fear Club

          http://fearclub.mystrikingly.com

          Automatically, anger comes to protect you from whatever is making you afraid, but then you lose your access to the intelligence and energy of Conscious Fear.

          Fear is not a design error.

          Fear is one quarter of your emotional body resources needed to Hold Space, Navigate Space, Go Nonlinear, Go Unreasonable, and whatever else is required to deliver your Archetypal Lineage.

          After you have received the benefits of Rage Club, it is important to continue along your Path into Fear Club.

          Is this scary? Hell, yes! Every week it is scary. The fear does not go away. We don't want it to. That would be not only impossible, but also Childish.

          With Upgraded Thoughtware and direct Experiences you change your relationship with Fear, all the way up to Archetypal 100% Intense Conscious Fear.

          Torus Technology

          http://torustechnology.org

          In 'archearchy' - the culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course - people meet in circles with nothing but open space between them. There is no boardroom table with the patriarchal 'leader' (whether male or female...) sits at the head with an already decided-upon agenda.

          Robert's Rules of Order have been replaced by Callahan's Rules of Chaos (under construction).

          A full range of procedures has been developed for efficient - albeit Nonlinear and sometimes also Unreasonable - governance, decision-making, conflict-transformation, problem-utilization, including Wisdom Counsel, The Purple Card, Frying Pan, Poop On The Table, Weapons On The Table, Resistance Decision Making, M.E.S.S. Process, Tar Baby Process, etc. These are all being effectively used online-and-offline.

          Torus Technology utilizes Possibility Management Distinctions, Tools, Thoughtware, and Processes...

          In other words, Torus Technology is a Gaian Gameworld.

          Gaian Gameworlds

          http://gaiangameworlds.org

          Gameworld Building alone includes a powerful cultural-evolution skillset for a Possibilitator to use in their own life, as well as providing for others in the world as a Service.

          However, building more effective Gameworlds in the Context of modern culture is like throwing gasoline on a planet that is already burning up.

          This is why creating Gaian Gameworlds has become such a central element of Possibilitator Training.

          Every Gaian Gameworld places Authentic Adulthood Initiations in the Context of Radical Responsibility as the primary currency at its center, and holds as its bottom-line purpose: nurturing Gaia.

          How do you know what 'nurtures Gaia'?

          You Become Gaia. Then you will feel it.

          In modern culture economics, for example, if a company (which is a Gameworld...) does not 'make a profit' it becomes illegal.

          In a similar way, in archearchal economics, if a Gameworld does not feed Gaia it becomes illegal.

          How will you learn how to create a real future for your village out of Gaian Gameworlds? One resource you will learn to use is Journey Into The Earth. Then, if you can Listen, Gaia herself will teach you how.

          We are so excited to ignite this creation-storm in the Human spirit.

        • Possibilitator Training Specialties

          Possibilitators support each other to learn the skills and build the Gaian Gameworld infrastructure for next culture - archearchy.

          After Phase 1 of Possibilitator Training, which is about Possibilitator thoughtware upgrades, building matrix, gaining extraordinary skills, healings, and initiations, then Phase 2 of Possibilitator Training begins: inhabiting your Possibilitator Specialty.

          We do not know what your Possibilitator Specialty will be. Perhaps no one in the world has ever created and inhabited your particular Specialty Space. This is your 'piece of the puzzle', your unique concern, your contribution to human beings shifting out of patriarchy and into archearchy.

          Here we list some of the Possibilitator Specialties we already see emerging.

          As more Possibilitators focus on a Specialty, Thematic Possibilitator Clumps will form and meet to replace or augment the existing Regional Possibilitator Clumps.

          Please tell us when you Take A Stand for your new Possibilitator Specialty by building its website so we can include it here!

          Please remember, a Possibilitator Specialty is NOT a fantasy world. If you claim to be some kind of 'Fire Storm Sorceress', the world is rather immediately going to demand that you prove it in reality.

          Possibility Coaching

          http://possibilitycoaching.org

          One of the specialties you might choose as a Possibilitator is to provide services of Possibility Coaching.

          This branch of the Coaching Industry was featured in the 2016 film Leap.

          Possibility Coaching gains its depth and effectiveness from using Distinctions from next culture (archearchy) which are Contexted in Radical Responsibility, and Inner Navigating - meaning the conscious use of Feelings and Emotions (very different from each other!) for navigating Transformational Emotional Healing Processes.

          On the Create Possibility website you will find 100 videos of actual Possibility Coaching sessions that you can watch.

          By 'sitting in' with the Possibility Coach and their courageous Client in these intimate, eye-opening, and very touching sessions, you not only Build Matrix but you also gain direct access to Space Navigating tools, techniques, and Processes that have take decades to develop.

          Possibility Coaching is valuable service. We are seeing that it can soon provide you with enough income that you can quit your corporate job and relocate your Point Of Origin into archearchy.

          Possibility Coaching is a Gaian Gameworld.

          Possibility Mediation

          http://possibilitymediation.org

          Possibility Mediation is the application of the Distinctions, Tools, Processes, and Thoughtmaps of Possibility Management to facilitate powerful, complete, swift, and supportable mediations between couples, organizations, firms and clients, police, courts, countries, etc.

          This is a newer application of Possibility Management, although Possibility Mediations using new clarity about Feelings, Emotions, Completion Loops, High Drama, Assumptions, Expectations, Resentment, Gremlin, and Purpose have been delivered as long as Possibility Management has been in existence.

          There is so much room for expansion here that we would be excited to support you building out your Possibility Mediation services.

          Please note that a Possibility Mediator's skill-base is hugely expanded through learning to deliver Torus Meeting Technologies, which we highly recommend. Then not only can you mediate between organizations, you can also mediate within organizations. This has been proving to be extraordinarily effective.

          Possibility Mediation is a Gaian Gameworld.

          Possibility Psychology

          http://possibilitypsychology.org

          Possibility Psychology distinguishes that humans are Beings wearing 5 Bodies (physical, intellectual, emotional, energetic, and archetypal). Through authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes beginning at eighteen years of age, the Being can distinguish between itself and its psychological Survival Strategy, and thereby Build Matrix to hold more and more consciousness.

          In Possibility Psychology we create the Possibility that the Client can Decontaminate their Ego States, use the Clarity of Upgraded Thoughtware, to step out of Reactivity, learn to Consciously Feel, Experientially discover Adulthood, change their relationship with their Gremlin, face their Demons, relocate their Point Of Origin, Wash Off The Canvas, Unmix their emotions, sew up their Brain Splits, bypass their Mind Machines, take Radical Responsibility for their personality (the Box), learn to Navigate the 3 Worlds (upperworld, middleworld, and underworld), jack-in to their Archetypal Lineage, and consciously journey into archetypal domains as a service to others, Living Full Out in a Culture of their own creation having High Level Fun. These Processes are all actively being delivered. What is needed are more Possibility Psychologists to deliver them!

          The Possibility Psychology (Psicologia das Possibilidades) Lato-Sensu Postgraduate (MBA) Degree Program is in development in a University in Brazil. For the current status report of the development Team, please click HERE.

          An additional University Program is in development in Germany under the guidance of Dr. Stefan Ackermann.

          Possibility Psychology is a Gaian Gameworld.

          Memetic Engineering

          http://memeticengineering.org

          The human mind uses 'memes' to think with. Memes can be compared with genes, in that, genes are the smallest instruction for the design of the physical body, and memes are the smallest instruction for the design of the intellectual body, the mind. (See 5 Bodies.)

          As a childhood Survival Strategy, children often build up a Memetic Construct with various Parts, and hide their Being deep within it.

          As is common with Decisions, once we make one it becomes the new 'normal' and we forget that we have made it. We think the world we create with a Being shaped by our Decision is real.

          Typically we unconsciously expect that this will all be transformed beginning around 18 years of age with Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes so we can take back our Authority and StartOver... however, authentic initiations were banished from western civilization about 6000 years ago.

          The result is that in modern culture our Being remains locked deep inside our Memetic Construct like a chick kept inside its eggshell not allowed to hatch, to live out our lives.

          In recent years, Memetic Engineering processes have been developed during which the Client takes Radical Responsibility step-by-step for building their Memetic Construct. The results have been truly transformational. Full transcripts of several Memetic Engineering processes are posted at the Memetic Engineering website.

          Typically Memetic Engineering is used as an adjunct to Possibility Coaching or Possibility Psychology processes, but can also be delivered as Memetic Engineering services.

          Torus Technology

          http://torustechnology.org

          In 'archearchy' - the culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course - people meet in circles with nothing but open space between them. There is no boardroom table with the patriarchal 'leader' (whether male or female...) sits at the head with an already decided-upon agenda.

          Robert's Rules of Order have been replaced by Callahan's Rules of Chaos (under construction).

          A full range of procedures has been developed for efficient - albeit Nonlinear and sometimes also Unreasonable - governance, decision-making, conflict-transformation, problem-utilization, including Wisdom Counsel, The Purple Card, Frying Pan, Poop On The Table, Weapons On The Table, Resistance Decision Making, M.E.S.S. Process, Tar Baby Process, etc. These are all being effectively used online-and-offline.

          Torus Technology utilizes Possibility Management Distinctions, Tools, Thoughtware, and Processes...

          In other words, Torus Technology is a Gaian Gameworld.

          Growness (replaces Business...)

          http://growness.org

          Every institution of modern culture is on its way out, going through the 'death and resurrection' process of reinvention, becoming regenerative, emerging from an entirely new basis and functionality, or else it is being entirely abandoned - as outdated as a flat map of the world, but more lethal.

          'Business as usual' is a central Memetic Construct of modern economy. Its design is fatally flawed. By devouring and burning everything on Earth, converting nature into cash to 'make a profit', continuing to use business is suicidal.

          There are two forms of growth. The modern economic business model depends on growth in size.

          Growness, an emerging archearchal economic model, depends on growth of awareness, evolution of consciousness.

          Value in modern culture is reduced to money.

          Value in next culture - archearchy - is expanded to include many actual currencies, including: distinctions, 3 phase healing processes, authentic adulthood initiatory processes, transformational processes, possibility, the Gaia, etc.

          A Growness is a Gaian Gameworld.

          Learning to create and manage Grownesses, bringing a modern culture business through the transformational vacuum of Nothingness and calling forth out of the ashes a Growness, facing down and handling all the uninitiated adolescent fears and Reactivity, delivering the needed Adulthood Initiations and Emotional Healing Processes... this is work for a million Possibilitators.

          Nanonations

          http://nanonations.org

          If the 6000-year-old Memetic Construct of 'the nation state' has exceeded its 'best if used by' date, what is replacing it?

          Since the 1960s, over 300 million Cultural Creatives have journeyed to the Thoughtware edges of modern culture, and stood there in awe.

          Looking back over their shoulders they see the Zombie-like hypnosis they had been living in, believing that modern culture was all that existed...

          Looking out over the edge of modern culture they see the utter wealth and abundance of diverse, enriching, regenerative-culture possibilities that spread out before them.

          Coming together in new tribal ventures, they implement Values of regenerative culture in local Authority, Initiation-centered, Intentional Communities, Ecovillages, and Nanonations.

          Each Nanonation is a Radically Responsible experiment, globally networking under a common purpose, which is to: establish critical connections between communities of practice to create a field of influence in the global ethnosphere for the emergence of next culture - archearchy.

          There is already a winning-happening high-level-fun infinite-game called United Nanonations. It is created by Possibilitators.

          Nanonations are a Gaian Gameworld.

          Feelings Practitioner

          http://feelingspractitioner.com

          For Possibilitators whose longing is to apply the Tools, Thoughtmaps, Distinctions, and Processes of Possibility Management for Healing the 5 Bodies, and in particular using Emotional Clarity for Physical Body healings, a Path has been created by a lively team of Possibilitators called Feelings Practitioner.

          For further details, please visit their website and contact them directly.

          Possibility Acting

          http://possibilityacting.mystrikingly.com

          Next-culture performers and actors need conscious skills for navigating all 3 Worlds: Upperworld, Middleworld, and Underworld. Otherwise losing our best stage workers to overdosing drugs and alcohol will remain the norm. Who will give actors the new skills, teach them to create and navigate nonlinear possibility spaces. It is those whose Possibilitator Specialty is Possibility Acting.

          Not only this, but where are the films and TV series full of transformational stories, legendary High Dramas, 3 Phase Healings, authentic adulthood initiations, and nonlinear breakthroughs?

          Where are the screenwriters taking Radical Responsibility for being in the process with their own characters creating Gaian Gameworlds? Who are our new heroines?

          There is so much exciting Possibility in this arena that these letters are nearly vibrating off the screen!

          Possibility Trainer Path

          http://trainerpath.org

          For Possibilitators whose longing is to share the Tools, Thoughtmaps, Distinctions, and Processes of Possibility Management through delivering Expand The Box trainings in various countries, ecovillages, and nanonations around the world, a Path has been created by a lively team of Possibilitators called Trainer Path.

          For further details, please visit their website and contact them directly.

          Going through the 10 Possibilitator Doorways is a prerequisite for entering Trainer Path.

          New Refugee Nanonations

          http://newrefugees.org

          The refugees being banished from their homelands and communities by climate change, flooding, desertification, war, famine, mono-culture crop failure, disease, or political strife are often the genius edgeworkers.

          The refugees being banished from their homeland gameworlds due to awareness increase, thoughtware upgrade, taking Radical Responsibility, growing up through healings and initiations are also often the genius edgeworkers.

          These two categories of 'outcasts' are both refugees. What if the two groups work together?

          What happens if archearchy thoughtware upgrades are adopted by those in refugee camps?

          The answer is that you create a self-reliant, resilient, local-authority nanonation. An autonomous zone of immensely high value, both culturally and socially.

          No longer are refugees victims. They are creators and inhabitants of regenerative-culture Gaian Gameworld Nanonations.

        • How It Works

          We are a global community of Possibilitators 'in Training'.

          We welcome you to apply to join us on the Journey!

          Some of us will make it. Some of us won't. This is life. Let's go!
          Possibilitator Training is an authentic archetypal Path.
          It has no end, but it certainly has a beginning.
          That beginning could be NOW for you... or not.

          1

          DO AN EXPAND THE BOX

          Fully participate in an online-or-offline 3-5 day Expand The Box training. This way you discover what Possibilitator Training is all about. GLOBAL CALENDAR

          2

          COMMIT TO YOURSELF TO DOING 10 POSSIBILITY LABS

          GLOBAL CALENDAR

          This Commitment is to yourself: to do whatever it takes to journey this Path. You are Taking A Stand for your own transformational adventure beyond the understanding of modern-culture Thoughtware. Nobody can make this Decision for you. On the other hand, nobody can stop you from Deciding.

           

          But, why is a Commitment needed?

          Because there will be both inner and outer obstacles along the Path. If you are not Committed, the first obstacle will stop you.

           

          A Commitment changes your shape. The Universe treats a Committed person with more respect than someone who is not Committed.

           

          You are a different person before and after your Commitment. After your Commitment, you are someone who is already Committed.

           

          But, what if I am afraid to Commit? What if I am not sure I can keep the Commitment? What if I don't know how?

          There is your first obstacle. Here you can learn to Commit first, before you know how to do it. 'Know How' is rare stuff. The Universe conserves Know How. If you were the Universe, would you give Know How to someone who was not already Committed? I don't think so.

           

          Your first Possibilitator skill is: learn to Commit before you Know How. Then the Universe can align to your new shape. Since you are already Committed, you will need certain resources to accomplish what you have set out to do. This is why, as Goethe said about boldly Committing, "Boldness has, genius, power, and magic in it."

           

          The first range of hills along the Path is populated by 10 Possibility Labs, including specialty Labs such as Outdoor Lab, Women's Lab, Possibility Village Lab, Men's Lab, etc.

          Your journey begins with the step you can take right now, the step that is in front of you. That step is: Committing to yourself to make it through at least 10 Labs. We wish you all the best in your Experiment.

          3

          APPLY BELOW

          Tell your Commitment to the Possibilitator Training Gatekeeper Team (Spaceholder: Vera Luisa Franco) through the form below.

           

          Please use the form to make your Commitment to yourself, and to Ask your Questions.

          No one has the same Questions you do.

          If you do not ask your Questions, the intelligent value of the Questions may be lost.

           

          When one person can ask their Questions, everyone benefits. This is how Possibility Management and Possibilitator Training came into existence in the first place: as answers to unanswerable questions.

          4

          CONNECT IN WITH YOUR NEW TEAM

          After you have Committed to yourself and asked your Questions, the first Regional Clumps of Possibilitators will meet in weekly online 'Zoom Workout Calls' of up to 25 people (25 is one Zoom screen full).

           

          Each 'Regional Clump', has its own 'Regional Clump Spaceholder' (shown below) and its own weekly Zoom Workout Calls.

           

          Every other week, one member of the global Trainer-Trainer Training School (TTTS) will serve as Spaceholder in your Possibilitator Regional Clump Call to provide rapid-learning exercises, transformational experiments, energetic food, context deepening, legendary stories, and Q & A time.

           

          Regional Clump Spaceholders will also meet in a Global Clump of Regional Clump Spaceholders for further exchanges, support, and training.

           

          Our purpose? To help everyone in our Clump to feel included, to build up their skills, to remove inner and outer obstacles to participating in their 10 PLabs, and to further prepare to jack-in to their Archetypal Lineage so they can create and navigate their Gaian Gameworlds as their part of the 'great transition' puzzle.

          5

          10 DOORWAYS

          Proceeding on the Path of becoming a Possibilitator - in reality, not just as a Fantasy World - is measurable and becomes visible ONE STEP AT A TIME as you actually go through - not simply look at - these 10 Doorways.

          6

          PLAY FULL OUT

          There is a Part of you which probably has - for your whole life - longed for trustworthy support to Play Full Out.

           

          In Possibilitator language, 'playing full out' means going through the '10 Doorways' in your life, so that you can create and live in the more beautiful world your heart knows is possible in reality.

           

          Through supporting and encouraging others to go through the 10 Doorways, you build the same courage in yourself.

           

          In Possibilitator Training we call this: High Level Fun!

          Thoughtware for next culture - archearchy.

        • Possibilitator Training is empowered by the tools, thoughtmaps, distinctions, and processes of Possibility Management

          Possibility Management is thoughtware for next culture - archearchy - the culture that naturally emerges after matriarchy and patriarchy have run their course. In many ways, a Possibilitator serves as a midwife for the emergence of next culture.

          Possibility Management Website

        • ...the global Team of Possibilitators

          http://possibilitymanagers.org

          ...the actual history and origins of PM

          http://museumofpm.possibilitymanagement.org

        • Apply for Possibilitator Training

          Joining this village is free after you have participated in a 3 to 5 day Expand The Box training.

          Please write to us below about your Commitment to participating in 10 Possibility Labs.

          We'll get in touch with you soon.

          Welcome!

          Shift! Go!

        • StartOver.xyz

          NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code POSSTRNG.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
